{{Infobox technique
| name = Shadestep
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique on the sixth page of the Book of Eternal Night that allows one to slip through space using shadow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shadestep]] is a technique used to break through hulls.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] used [[Shadestep]] to close the distance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
